# Personal Agent Naming (PAN): agentnaming.ai

> The reference registrar for Personal Agent Names: email-anchored handles
> (`<name>.<email>`) that resolve to a card of endpoints where an agent can be
> reached. Naming only; transport-neutral.

## For agents

- [Agent setup runbook](https://agentnaming.ai/agent-setup.md): executable
  instructions to claim a handle, run the AgentMesh mesh-adapter, pair, and
  verify. One human-in-the-loop step (an emailed verification code).
- Resolution is public, no auth:
  `GET https://agentnaming.ai/api/resolve?handle=<full-handle>`
- WebFinger: `GET https://agentnaming.ai/.well-known/webfinger?resource=acct:<handle>`

## Reference

- [The PAN specification](https://agentnaming.ai/spec)
- [Site overview](https://agentnaming.ai/)
- [AgentMesh (the default transport)](https://agentmesh.ai/)
